sql: SELECT strategy_id, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS wr, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) AS avg_net FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id LIKE 'copy-hotlead-hold%' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL AND entry_ts >= (unixepoch()-4*86400) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY tot_net DESC
